active.name: Oral-Systemic Health Baseline Study, Rwanda
active.description: A cross-sectional research study documenting the prevalence of dental conditions and their systemic health correlations in Rwandan adults.

active.name: Daily Oral Health Messaging Campaign
active.description: Automated daily preventive care messages distributed to community members via SMS and social media platforms.

active.name: Huye District School Dental Screening Drive
active.description: Systematic oral health screenings across 7 primary schools in Huye District, identifying untreated caries and periodontal conditions.

completed.name: World Ectodermal Dysplasia Day 2026
completed.description: Community awareness event raising support for individuals and families affected by Ectodermal Dysplasia in Rwanda and beyond.

planned.name: Mobile Dental Clinic, Rural Outreach Q1
planned.description: Mobile dental unit providing free extractions, fluoride treatment, and oral hygiene kits to communities in underserved areas.

planned.name: Interdisciplinary Health Workshop Series
planned.description: Training workshops for dental and medical professionals on integrating oral and systemic health in patient care.
